testInfo.summary:
Validates that consents are actually authorised on redirect
• Call the POST Consents API with either the customer business or the customer personal PERMISSIONS, depending on what option has been selected by the user on the configuration field
• Expect a 201 - Validate all of the fields of response_body of the POST Consents API response
• Call the GET Consent API with Bearer Token
• Expect a 200 response - Validate all the fields
• Validate if status is "AWAITING_AUTHORIZATION"
• Redirect the user to authorize the created ConsentID - Request all the OPIN Phase 2 scopes
• Calls the GET Consents endpoint with the authorized consentID
• Expects a 200 - Validate that the Consent is on an Authorised state
